name: PERICARDIAL TERATOMA

demographics.Histo: derivatives of all 3 germ cell layers (neuroglia, cartilage, skeletal muscle, liver,
demographics.Location: within pericardial sac connected to a great vessel via a pedicle; intramyocardial

dominant_finding: large mass of heterogeneous signal intensity
distribution: within pericardial sac connected to a great vessel via a pedicle; intramyocardial
discriminating_features: large mass of heterogeneous signal intensity
intrapericardial heterogeneous complex multilocular cystic mass:
fetal hydrops (ascites, pleural effusion, subcutaneous edema, polyhydramnios)

US: intrapericardial heterogeneous complex multilocular cystic mass:
fetal hydrops (ascites, pleural effusion, subcutaneous edema, polyhydramnios)
MR: large mass of heterogeneous signal intensity

clinical.Rx: emergent pericardiocentesis (life-threatening lesion); urgent surgical excision
